item.harvest-statue.name: Harvest Statue
item.harvest-statue.description: A small Junimo statue. Place indoors to have the Junimos gather crops each morning.
item.parrot-pot.name: Parrot Pot
item.parrot-pot.description: A decorative parrot pot. Place on the Ginger Island farm to have parrots gather crops each morning.
message.junimos.full: The Junimos at the {{location}} couldn't harvest due to lack of storage!
message.junimos.ate: The Junimos at the {{location}} ate harvested crops due to lack of storage!
message.junimos.harvested: The Junimos at the {{location}} have harvested crops.
message.parrots.full: The Parrots at the Ginger Island farm couldn't harvest due to lack of storage!
message.parrots.ate: The Parrots at the Ginger Island farm ate harvested crops due to lack of storage!
message.parrots.harvested: The Parrots at the Ginger Island farm have harvested crops.
placement.harvest-statue.only-indoors: The Harvest Statue can only be placed indoors.
placement.harvest-statue.one-per-locatio: Only one Harvest Statue can be placed in this location.
placement.parrot-pot.only-island: The Parrot Pot can only be placed on the Ginger Island farm.
placement.parrot-pot.one-only: Only one Parrot Pot can be placed.
mail.harvest-statue: Enclosed you'll find blueprints for a statue imbued with forest magic.^ ^If placed indoors, it allows Junimos to enter buildings and harvest crops.^ ^Use it well...^ ^-M. Rasmodius, Wizard%item craftingRecipe HarvestStatueRecipe %%
gmcm.intro: Configure the Harvest Statue and Parrot Pot.
gmcm.harvest-message.name: Harvest Messages
gmcm.harvest-message.tooltip: Show a morning message when either Gatherer storage successfully harvests items.
gmcm.eat-excess.name: Eat Excess Crops
gmcm.eat-excess.tooltip: Allow gathered items that do not fit in storage to be consumed instead of stopping the harvest.
gmcm.harvest-pots.name: Harvest Garden Pots
gmcm.harvest-pots.tooltip: Harvest ripe crops and forage from garden pots.
gmcm.harvest-fruit-trees.name: Harvest Fruit Trees
gmcm.harvest-fruit-trees.tooltip: Collect fruit from fruit trees in the Gatherer's location.
gmcm.harvest-flowers.name: Harvest Flowers
gmcm.sow-seeds.name: Replant Harvested Crops
gmcm.sow-seeds.tooltip: Replant harvested crop tiles using matching seeds stored in the Gatherer storage.
gmcm.minimum-fruit.name: Fruit Harvest Minimum
gmcm.minimum-fruit.tooltip: Set how many fruit must be on a tree before either Gatherer harvests it.
gmcm.storage-capacity.name: Storage Capacity
gmcm.storage-capacity.tooltip: Set the shared capacity of both the Harvest Statue and Parrot Pot. The default is 36 slots.
gmcm.appear.junimos.name: Show Junimos After Harvest
gmcm.appear.junimos.tooltip: Allow Junimos to appear when entering a location after its Harvest Statue gathered crops.
gmcm.max-junimos.name: Maximum Junimos
gmcm.max-junimos.tooltip: Set the maximum Junimos considered for a post-harvest appearance. Use -1 to derive the limit from harvested tiles.
gmcm.force-recipe.name: Unlock Harvest Statue Recipe
gmcm.force-recipe.tooltip: Send the Harvest Statue recipe letter without requiring the Magic Ink prerequisite.
gmcm.appear.parrots.name: Show Parrots After Harvest
gmcm.appear.parrots.tooltip: Allow parrots to appear after the Parrot Pot harvests.
